name: Gourmet Double Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cream butter, sugars, vanilla, and cocoa powder together until smooth. Stir in the remaining ingredients and mix well. Refrigerate for 30 minutes. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart. Bake until cookies are set, 5-8 minutes. Cool slightly before removing from the pan. For larger cookies, press down gently on the dough to help cook more evenly; bake a bit longer, 8-10 minutes.
